calendar.matters:
Petition To Confirm Settlement
Off Calendar Feb-04-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Randy Schmidt for James Cline.

Mr. Schmidt stated that the two non-signatory Beneficiaries were not involved in the settlement process and that he received no objections. The Court noted that the two non-signatory Beneficiaries received notice of today's hearing and stated that they had the opportunity to show up. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Settlement (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
